---
title: "The Rev. Merton Smith"
---

## The Rev. Merton Smith

**Dates:** (1823-1883)

### Description

Vicar of St. Mary’s Plympton

### Biography

He disappeared while on holiday in the Pyrenees in August 1883 and his body was not found until April 1885. [<i>The Times</i> 28, 30 August, 7 November 1883;  <i>Pall Mall Gazette</i> 24 April 1885]

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
